Open the news website https://www.newsnow.co.uk/, and craft a poem inspired by the first article you encounter. Begin each line of your poem with 'In order'. You can alter this word in future revisions to create different effects.
Write a set of words related to poacher. Then write a second set of words related to one of the first set. Ignore the first set and create a poem from the second set.
Create an epitaph for a knife, a short poem that serves as a memorial, honoring their legacy in a few poignant lines.
